variant_name: 高父 — 满月宴外祖父
trigger: 在厅堂为外孙女昭昭举办满月宴时

appearance_delta.face: 红光满面，眉头彻底舒展，笑容慈祥灿烂，一扫之前的愁云惨雾
appearance_delta.body: 精神矍铄，步伐轻快，显得年轻了几分
appearance_delta.hair: 梳理得一丝不苟，佩戴成色极好的玉簪
appearance_delta.distinguishing_features: 摆脱前世阴影与渣男纠缠后的通透释然，但在沈词出现时会瞬间收敛笑容

costume_override.outfit: 暗红色带福寿暗纹的华贵锦缎常服，彰显家族底蕴与喜庆气氛

visual_reference: A 50-year-old ancient Chinese grandfather, slightly chubby, wearing a luxurious dark red casual ancient robe with subtle auspicious patterns. Half-white hair neatly tied with a jade hairpin. Kind face with wrinkles, smiling warmly and looking completely relieved and joyful. Festive banquet background with red silk, bright cinematic lighting, photorealistic.
